use_cases: Displaying a user-friendly 404 error when a page is not found
Showing a branded error page for broken or deleted routes
Providing navigation options after encountering a missing page
Displaying user avatar in the error page context
Maintaining consistent branding during error states
ai_summary: A minimalist 404 error page component designed to display when requested content cannot be found. Features a clean, modern aesthetic suitable for any industry, with an embedded Avatar component using Radix UI primitives for user profile display. Responsive design works across desktop and mobile platforms with a straightforward, accessible implementation.
